testcase.name: TC04 - Budget Homes listings display prices within ceiling and EMI Calculator computes correctly

testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page................passed When the user clicks the Buy heading........................................passed And the user clicks "Budget Homes"..........................................passed And the user switches to the new tab........................................passed Then the first 5 property prices should be displayed........................failed When the user clicks on the first property listing..........................skipped And the user switches to the property detail tab............................skipped And the user clicks the Apply Loan button...................................skipped And the user switches to the loan calculator tab............................skipped And the user enters loan amount "30,00,000" and interest rate "7.5".........skipped And the user selects property not finalized radio button....................skipped And the user clicks Calculate EMI...........................................skipped Then the EMI details should be displayed....................................skipped
